system.description:
Familiarity with underworld society and the ways of working with it.
  • Locating a fence for stolen goods in a town or city: Streetwise/INT 8+
  • Knowing how to behave in front of organized crime bosses: Streetwise/SOC 8+
  • Identifying gangs or cartels by their clothing or weaponry: Streetwise/EDU 8+
system.shortdescr: Familiarity with underworld society, fences, gangs, and crime.
